allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./bets.js'\); console.log\('bets.js parses, BETS length:', \(eval\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./bets.js','utf8'\) + '; BETS.length'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); eval\(fs.readFileSync\('bets.js','utf8'\)\); console.log\('matches:',BETS.length\); console.log\('players:',Object.keys\(BETS[0]\).filter\(k=>!['grupa','datum','tim1','tim2'].includes\(k\)\)\); console.log\('groups:',[...new Set\(BETS.map\(b=>b.grupa\)\)]\); console.log\('dates:',[...new Set\(BETS.map\(b=>b.datum\)\)]\); console.log\('sample last:', JSON.stringify\(BETS[BETS.length-1],null,1\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); global.BETS=undefined; eval\(fs.readFileSync\('bets.js','utf8'\)+'; global.BETS=BETS;'\); const B=global.BETS; console.log\('matches:',B.length\); console.log\('players:',Object.keys\(B[0]\).filter\(k=>!['grupa','datum','tim1','tim2'].includes\(k\)\)\); console.log\('groups:',[...new Set\(B.map\(b=>b.grupa\)\)]\); console.log\('dates:',[...new Set\(B.map\(b=>b.datum\)\)]\); console.log\('last:', JSON.stringify\(B[B.length-1]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); eval\(fs.readFileSync\('bets.js','utf8'\)+'; global._B=BETS;'\); const B=global._B; fs.mkdirSync\('js',{recursive:true}\); fs.mkdirSync\('css',{recursive:true}\); const out='// Auto-generated betting predictions for World Cup 2026 pool.\\n// Each entry: group, date, two teams, and one prediction object per player\\n// \(ishod = 1/X/2 outcome, rezultat = exact score guess\).\\nexport const BETS = '+JSON.stringify\(B,null,2\)+';\\n'; fs.writeFileSync\('js/data.js',out\); console.log\('wrote js/data.js bytes=',out.length\);")

Bash(git commit -q --amend -m 'Redesign UI into a multi-file ES module app' -m 'Replace the single-file index.html \(which read a global BETS and broke the Netlify deploy after bets.js was removed\) with a structured, light-theme redesign: *)
